CREATE AGGREGATE test_schema.my_sum AS SELECT SUM(value) FROM test_table GROUP BY category;
COMMENT ON AGGREGATE test_schema.my_sum IS 'Calculates the total sum of values for each category';
COMMENT ON AGGREGATE test_schema.my_average IS 'Computes the average of numeric values in a given category';
COMMENT ON AGGREGATE test_schema.my_count IS NULL;
CREATE AGGREGATE test_schema.my_std_dev AS SELECT STDEV(value) FROM test_table GROUP BY category;
COMMENT ON AGGREGATE test_schema.my_std_dev IS 'Computes the standard deviation of a group of numeric values';
COMMENT ON AGGREGATE test_schema.my_std_dev IS NULL;
COMMENT ON AGGREGATE test_schema.my_median IS 'Calculates the median of numeric values';
CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER, value NUMERIC, category VARCHAR(50));
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value, category) VALUES (1, 10.5, 'A'), (2, 20.3, 'A'), (3, 15.4, 'B');
COMMENT ON AGGREGATE test_schema.my_sum IS 'Calculates the total sum of values for each category';
COMMENT ON AGGREGATE test_schema.my_average IS 'Calculates the average value of each category with precision adjustment';
COMMENT ON AGGREGATE test_schema.aggregate_test IS 'An aggregate function for unit testing';
